text: Can’t wait to watch this! 💙💛 Hoping to see Londynn!! she may not have finished at UCLA, but she was such a pivotal piece in building the program. Always rooting for her!

I gave adversity beyond imagination on the daily.  Being a Bruin it is ingrained in me that me daily to conquer adversity daily. Coach Close and this team is embodiment of it. Thank you ladies for shining that light
